settings.title: Settings

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.description: Review the organization nodes available to your team and whether they are currently connected.
nodes.empty: No nodes are available for this organization.

scopeChangeDialog.title: Change node scope
scopeChangeDialog.toSharedDescription: Making "{{name}}" shared will allow all organization members to use this node. Are you sure?
scopeChangeDialog.toPrivateDescription: Making "{{name}}" private will restrict access to the node owner only. Any workspaces currently using this node may lose access. Are you sure?

unregisterDialog.title: Unregister node
unregisterDialog.description: Unregistering "{{name}}" will remove it from this organization. Any workspaces using this node may lose access. Are you sure?

serviceTokens.title: Service Tokens
serviceTokens.description: Create and manage service tokens for authenticating the CLI on remote hosts without a browser login.
serviceTokens.empty: No service tokens have been created yet.
serviceTokens.createdWarning: Store this token securely — it will not be shown again.

createDialog.title: Create service token
createDialog.description: Service tokens allow the CLI to authenticate on remote hosts without an interactive browser login. Use them for headless servers, CI pipelines, or any non-interactive environment.
createDialog.expiresHelp: Leave empty for a token that never expires.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke service token
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke "{{name}}"? Any CLI or service using this token will immediately lose access.

members.title: Organization members
members.description: Review who belongs to the cur organization and what access role each person has.
members.empty: No members are available for this organization.
members.inviteSent: Invitation sent. They will be added when they register.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.leaveDescription: You will lose access to all projects, workspaces, and resources in this organization.

removeDialog.title: Remove member?
removeDialog.description: {{email}} will be removed from the organization and will lose access immediately.

leaveDialog.title: Leave organization?
leaveDialog.description: You will lose access to this organization and all its resources. This cannot be undone.

pendingInvites.title: Pending invitations
pendingInvites.description: These email addresses have been invited but have not yet registered.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel invitation?
cancelDialog.description: The invitation to {{email}} will be revoked. They will no longer be able to join this organization using it.

account.title: Account profile
account.description: Review the profile attached to your signed-in Yishan account.
account.empty: No signed-in user profile is available.

organization.title: Current Organization
organization.description: Review your active organization, plan, and membership role.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Track monthly quotas and current consumption for account features.

workspace.title: Workspace branch naming
workspace.description: Configure one global branch naming rule for workspace creation.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Manage default preferences used for workspace and project setup.

defaultContext.label: Enable default context
defaultContext.description: When enabled, new projects and workspaces create and link the .my-context folder by default.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Manage which agents are available in tab creation and verify local CLI detection.
agents.loadError: Failed to load agent detection statuses.

cliTools.title: CLI Tools
cliTools.description: Manage local CLI tools used by agents and integrations.
cliTools.loadError: Failed to load CLI tool statuses.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: View the connection status of external services.

skills.title: Agent Skills
skills.description: Browse official skills, install third-party skills from a source, and manage skill lifecycle from the desktop.
skills.confirmRemoveDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"?
skills.success: Skill installed. Restart your agent to take effect.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose how Yishan looks across the app.

markdown.title: Markdown
markdown.description: Configure how markdown files open in the editor.

theme.label: Preview theme
theme.description: Choose whether markdown preview inherits the app theme or stays light/dark independently.

defaultViewMode.label: Default markdown view mode
defaultViewMode.description: Choose how markdown files open by default.

previewFontSize.label: Preview font size
previewFontSize.description: Control text size in markdown preview.

previewWidth.label: Preview width
previewWidth.description: Choose whether preview spans full width or uses a readable column.

outlineVisible.label: Show markdown outline
outlineVisible.description: Display the document outline beside markdown files.

links.title: Link opening behavior
links.description: Choose where HTTP links open inside the app.

daemon.title: Daemon
daemon.description: Inspect the local daemon used for workspaces, terminals, and background services.

controls.title: Daemon Controls
controls.description: Manage daemon lifecycle and shutdown behavior.

restart.label: Restart Daemon
restart.description: Stop and start the local daemon process.
restart.terminalCloseFailed: Failed to close terminal sessions. Please close them manually and try again.
restart.confirmMessage: All terminal sessions will be closed and their running processes terminated. This action cannot be undone.

quitOnExit.label: Quit daemon before app exits
quitOnExit.description: When enabled, the daemon is stopped before the desktop app exits. When disabled, the daemon continues running in the background.

log.label: Daemon Log
log.description: View the raw daemon log entries for troubleshooting and diagnostics.
log.title: Daemon Log

relay.title: Relay Connection
relay.description: Status of the outbound relay connection used for remote access.

cli.title: Yishan CLI
cli.description: Install yishan in your terminal to use AI agent workflows directly from your shell, scripts, and remote SSH sessions.

computerUse.title: Computer Use
computerUse.description: Review the macOS permissions Computer Use depends on and what each permission unlocks for agents.
computerUse.approvalNotice: Mutating Computer Use actions still require approval when called by an agent.

permissions.accessibilityDescription: Required for UI inspection, UI actions, mouse control, and keyboard input.
permissions.screenRecordingDescription: Required for display and window screenshot capture.
permissions.inputMonitoringDescription: Used by some systems to gate global input delivery. Check manually if input tools are unreliable.
permissions.automationDescription: Used for app-to-app automation paths when the runtime needs Apple Events in future workflows.
permissions.cameraDescription: Webcam capture and camera-driven local test apps. Not currently used by the Computer Use runtime.
permissions.fullDiskAccessDescription: Persistent access to protected folders from terminal sessions and future local automation workflows.
permissions.localNetworkDescription: Discovery and access for development servers on your network. Reserved for future runtime support.
permissions.usbDevicesDescription: Hardware debugging and device tools that talk to USB devices. Reserved for future runtime support.
permissions.bluetoothDescription: Bluetooth device tools and local hardware experiments. Reserved for future runtime support.

terminal.title: Terminal sessions
terminal.description: Review all running terminals and stop sessions from one place.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Configure project memory summarization and indexing for your workspaces.

summarizer.title: Session Summarizer
summarizer.description: When enabled, the daemon will automatically summarize each agent session using an external LLM and update your .my-context/MEMORY.md file.

enabled.label: Enable session summarization
enabled.description: After each agent session, extract technical decisions, discoveries, and errors into the project memory file.

agentKind.label: Summarizer agent
agentKind.description: The agent CLI used to run the summarization prompt.

model.label: Model
model.description: Optional model override. Leave empty to use the agent's default model.

settings.comingSoon: This settings page is coming soon.
